title: Apollo 39pc Pink Home DIY Repair Tool Kit Set. Women Ladies Starter Basic Hand Tools in a Compact and Portable Toolbox Case for Household and Office
features: The Original 39 Piece Home Tool Kit Set: With over 1 Million Units Sold Worldwide. A cleverly chosen selection of home tools; simply complete repairs, emergency fixes, and basic maintenance with ease
Handy Womens Tool Kit Set: Durable steel hand tools, featuring non-slip and ergonomic handles for comfortable grip and precision during screwdriving, hammering, installation, and assembly tasks

Portable Ladies Small Tool Box Case: Carried in a compact and lightweight tool box case that keeps everything organized and easily accessible; just grab and go, wherever it's at home, the office or college
Girls Tool Kit Idea: Its variety of hand tools makes it a thoughtful and essential tool kit gift set for the handy-person, homeowner or student whether it's for DIY fixes, repairs or maintenance
PINK RIBBON FOUNDATION - HELP A GOOD CAUSE: With every purchase of this home tool set, a donation of £1 will be made to the Pink Ribbon Foundation to help those affected by breast cancer
description: Product Description Hi-Spec 39pc Pink Home Tool Kit Set for Women. Ladies Small DIY Tool Box Kit Based on our original 39 Piece Household Toolkit with Over 1 Million Units Sold Worldwide. This compact tool box set is perfect for any handy person looking to tackle those urgent DIY jobs around the household and workplace. Take on maintenance, emergency fixes, basic repairs, and weekend projects PRETTY IN PINK The Most-Reached-For Hand Tools for General DIY Basics Whether for the home, apartment, college dorm or workplace, its small compact size and lively colour trim makes it a stand-out set for tightening, opening, fixing and everyday household repairs Contoured and soft-texture handles offer non-slip comfort holding All in a handy lightweight tool box to grab and go anywhere THE PINK RIBBON FOUNDATION With every purchase made, a donation of £1 will be made to the Pink Ribbon Foundation to forward women's' health research and to give needed assistance The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. The video compares multiple products. The video shows the product being unpacked. Video Player is loading. Click to play video Play Mute Current Time  0:00 / Duration  0:00 Loaded : 0% Stream Type  LIVE Seek to live, currently behind live LIVE Remaining Time  - 0:00   1x Playback Rate Chapters Chapters Descriptions descriptions off , selected Captions captions off , selected Audio Track Fullscreen This is a modal window. PRACTICAL BEGINNER'S DIY For the Household, Apartment, College or Office Get going in everyday DIY tasks! Tighten all sort of screws. Assemble furniture. Open and remove parts. Hammer, grip, cut and very much more Whether needed as a special occasion gift or just as an essential set of household tools, this toolkit will have whatever task you are working on covered All the Hand Tools You Need for Success in One Easy-To-Carry Tool Box A comprehensive selection of must-have tools, in a durable steel construction with contoured non-slip handles, that lets you quickly screwdrive, hammer, install and assemble every time. All the essentials fit conveniently in a lightweight and portable toolbox - just carry it to wherever the task is! 1 2 3 4 5 6 Complete Contents Claw Hammer (230g / 8oz.) For hammering or removing small nails around the home for a range of materials - the hammer is an essential piece of home DIY equipment 4 x Precision Screwdriver Set For working on a range of tiny screws found at home especially those used in small electrical items and small home items Combination Pliers (150mm/6") With a firm grip these are excellent for grabbing and rotating nuts and bolts, while the built-in blade can snip through thin wire 8 x Hex/Allen Keys For assembling consumer items including towel bars, door handles, flat pack furniture and book shelves as well as working on bikes8 x Scissors (200mm / 8") Versatile kitchen scissors made from stainless steel - great for everyday tasks. Includes a built-in bottle cap grip Bit Driver Handle The bit driver handle and its built-in magnet securely holds in the assorted driver bits for screwdriving jobs 20 x Driver Bits For complete crewdriving coverage for the commonly-found screws in and around the household, this extensive bit selection will make sure you stay prepared Driver Bit Types and Sizes Slotted 3mm,4mm, 5mm,6mm; Phillips PH1;PH2; PH3; PZ1; PZ2; PZ3; Torx T10, T15, T20, T25, T27, T30; Hex 3mm,4mm, 5mm,6mm Tape Measure (3.5m / 12ft) A retractable tape measure for rooms, spaces, walls and all measuring Torpedo Spirit Level A handy spirit level to make shelves, picture frames and bracket are perfectly straight and level Whether its home improvement, DIY repairs, workshop projects or craftwork, Hi-Spec offers a quality and affordable range that encompass an entire scope of hand tools, power tools and toolkit sets.
